prompt: Create a hyper-realistic open-world crime video game screenshot in the style of a modern Miami-inspired beach club mission scene, captured in bright midday sunlight with a clear blue sky. Show a third-person gameplay-like composition with a young adult man with short dark hair, light skin, wearing a plain black t-shirt and patterned swim shorts seated casually in the foreground on pale sand, turned slightly to the side as if the player camera stopped near him. Place him large in frame, off-center left, with natural relaxed body posture. Behind him, depict an upscale beachfront club with exactly 3 white cabanas with flowing curtains visible across the sand, multiple tall palm trees, turquoise ocean water on the left, and an art-deco hotel strip on the right with pastel facades and neon accents. Populate the beach with a lively crowd of exactly 12 background people in swimwear: some standing and chatting, some walking near the shoreline, and exactly 2 seated at a dining table on the right with food and drinks. Include white lounge furniture, umbrellas, and a polished social party atmosphere. Add a convincing video game HUD overlay: a square mini-map in the bottom-left labeled GPS Route, weapon and control icons in the bottom-right, and a money counter in the top-right reading $45,670. The overall feel should resemble a next-gen Grand Theft Auto VI gameplay screenshot, cinematic but clearly in-game, with sharp environmental detail, realistic shadows, vibrant coastal color grading, and subtle satirical luxury-beach energy in Vice City.
